utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Okay look , do not ... do not be mad okay ?

emotion_cause.span: 1_do not ... do not be mad okay ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: But after I unpacked the boxes I wanted to do something nice for you , so , I ... I ... I cleaned the apartment .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: So I moved everything around and then I forgot where it , where it went back and I am sorry , I am very sorry , I am sorry , I am sorry .

emotion_cause.span: 3_I moved everything around and then I forgot where it , where it went back

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: It is okay . Chandler , are you afraid of me or something ?

emotion_cause.span: 3_I am sorry , I am very sorry , I am sorry , I am sorry .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Do you want me to be afraid of you ?

emotion_cause.span: 5_Do you want me to be afraid of you ?
7_Chandler what you did , it is , it is a wonderful thing and I really appreciate it .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I mean gosh , Chandler what you did , it is , it is a wonderful thing and I really appreciate it .

emotion_cause.span: 7_Chandler what you did , it is , it is a wonderful thing and I really appreciate it .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I know I have this weird thing where I want everything to be in the perfect place , but I would never expect you to worry about that .

emotion_cause.span: 8_I know I have this weird thing where I want everything to be in the perfect place , but I would never expect you to worry about that .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Oh well you are the best . You come here to me .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: All right , hold on okay ? First thing first . Okay , now did Ross sit anywhere while he was naked ?
